channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CRDB Bank Supports Youth Development in Tanzania
item.description: The article highlights CRDB Bank's collaboration with Mwana FA to nurture youth talents in Tanzania. The initiative aims to provide young people with opportunities to develop their skills and contribu...

item.title: Kenya Law Society Announces Boycott of Judges Over Integrity Concerns
item.description: The Law Society of Kenya (LSK) has released a list of judges and judicial officers targeted for a boycott by advocates, starting July 23, 2026. The move comes after months of failed negotiations with ...

item.title: Andy Burnham outlines plans to address social care and homelessness as new PM
item.description: Andy Burnham, the newly appointed UK prime minister, has outlined his priorities for addressing long-standing social challenges, including the crisis in social care and homelessness. In his first majo...

item.title: Andy Burnham Appointed U.K. Prime Minister After Starmer Resignation
item.description: Andy Burnham has been appointed as the new Prime Minister of the United Kingdom following the resignation of Keir Starmer. The 55-year-old Labour leader secured his position after winning a by-electio...

item.title: Volkswagen Faces Job Cuts as Staff Meetings with CEO Loom
item.description: The works council of Volkswagen, Germany's largest carmaker, has announced that staff assemblies will be held in August to discuss potential job cuts. CEO Oliver Blume is set to attend meetings at the...

item.title: Niger State Police Crackdown: 115 Vehicles Seized For Unregistered Plates And Illegal Tinting
item.description: The Niger State Police Command carried out a major crackdown on unregistered vehicles, defaced number plates, and illegal tinted glasses, resulting in the impoundment of 115 vehicles across the state....

item.title: Legendary Footballer and Manager Kevin Keegan Dies at 75
item.description: Kevin Keegan, a former England captain and manager, has passed away at the age of 75 following a battle with stage four cancer. His family confirmed his death, stating he was surrounded by his wife an...

item.title: Australia's plan to use superannuation funds for national challenges faces risks
item.description: Australia's government is proposing to redirect $4 trillion from superannuation funds to address national challenges like housing, productivity, and the clean energy transition. While the idea of usin...

item.title: Biola Fowosere recounts alleged family abandonment, depression and years without contact from ex-husband
item.description: Yoruba Nollywood actress and producer Biola Fowosere has shared an emotional account of how, according to her, her ex-husband left her and their children without any explanation, an experience she sai...

item.title: Legendary footballer and manager Kevin Keegan passes away at 75
item.description: Kevin Keegan, the iconic English footballer and manager, has passed away at the age of 75 after a battle with stage four cancer. The news was announced by his family through a statement from Sky Sport...

item.title: Senior crime intelligence officer faces extortion and assault charges
item.description: Senior crime intelligence investigator Col Ismail Dawood is set to surrender to police amid allegations of extortion and assault related to a R3.5m debt dispute. His lawyer, Adv Piet du Plessis, confi...

item.title: Man Killed in Parking Lot Near Santa Monica Pier Early Monday
item.description: A man was fatally shot in a parking lot adjacent to the Santa Monica Pier on July 20, 2026, shortly after the area was vacated by World Cup fans celebrating the final match. Santa Monica Police Depart...

item.title: Monduli Vaccinates Over 2,000 Livestock
item.description: In Monduli, a significant public health initiative has been undertaken to protect livestock from preventable diseases. Over 2,000 animals have been vaccinated as part of a community-driven effort to e...

item.title: Flash Flood and Landslide Displace Over 100 Families in Calamba City
item.description: A flash flood and subsequent landslide in Calamba City have forced over 100 families to evacuate their homes, according to a report by ABS-CBN News. The disaster, which occurred on July 20, 2026, caus...

item.title: Andy Burnham's Leadership and Its Impact on London's Future
item.description: The article explores the potential implications of Andy Burnham's leadership as the new UK Prime Minister, focusing on his policies and their impact on London. Burnham, a Labour leader from the north,...

item.title: Viking 1's 1976 Mars Landing: A Historic First for Human Exploration
item.description: The Viking 1 mission, launched by NASA in 1976, marked a pivotal moment in space exploration as it became the first spacecraft to successfully land on Mars and transmit images of the planet's surface ...

item.title: Peterborough Music Community Debates AI's Role in Concert Posters
item.description: A debate has erupted in Peterborough's music community over the use of artificial intelligence to create concert posters. Musicians are split between those who see AI as a cost-effective tool for prom...

item.title: BJP's Hema Malini and Kangana Call for Dialogue Over Education Protests
item.description: BJP MP Hema Malini criticized ongoing protests over the NEET-UG 2026 paper leak controversy, urging students to resolve issues through dialogue rather than demonstrations. She defended the government'...

item.title: Ontario MPP Faces Spending Controversy Over Riding Association Expenses
item.description: Ontario Progressive Conservative MPP Stan Cho is facing renewed scrutiny over allegations of misuse of public funds, following revelations that his riding association billed nearly $100,000 in food an...

item.title: Houthis Declare Naval Blockade on Saudi Arabia Amid Iran War Escalation
item.description: The article details the escalating conflict between Houthis and Saudi Arabia, with the Houthis declaring a naval blockade as a new front in the Iran war. This move comes amid ongoing tensions followin...
